Design_Description: Add per-token depth gate to cross-attention logits via two zero-init linear probes (global depth + per-token depth); fixed sigma=1.0; gate is additive in log-space.
Depth-gated cross-attention with learnable log-sigma (init=0 → sigma=1) and auxiliary smooth-L1 loss (weight 0.1) on the global depth probe output.
22 body-only joint queries + linear hand recovery (aux weight 0.1) + fixed-sigma Gaussian depth gate (sigma=1.0) on cross-attention logits; both mechanisms combined.
